'''Mobquet Swoops and Speeders'''<ref name="Official Guide" /> was a manufacturing company and a division of [[Tagge Corporation|TaggeCo]]<ref name="Speeders Encyclopedia" /> that notably produced the [[SX-14 Field Hover-Ute]] utility vehicle<ref name="CL 2016" /> and the [[M-68 landspeeder]],<ref name="Official Guide" /> as well as the [[Ripper (speeder bike)|Ripper]] [[speeder bike]].<ref name="Collapse" />

{{Company-stub}}
